title: leucas decemdentata var. angustifolia
intro: Leucas decemdentata var. angustifolia, also known as the narrow-leaved or Indian snakeweed, is a plant species in the mint family. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and treating respiratory problems. Leucas decemdentata var. angustifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use.
